# Flag Names

Flag name generation.

## Proto Requirements:
* Fields can point to other message types.

```
message Resource {
  ...

  // Book message.
  Book book = 2;
}
```

* CRUDL commands point to a body field named after resource. non-CRUDL commands
use body field '*'.

```
// The request structure for the CreateResource method.
message CreateResourceRequest {
  // The parent of the resource.
  string parent = 1 [
    (.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED,
    (.google.api.resource_reference) = {
      child_type: "example.googleapis.com/Resource"
    }
  ];

  // The desired state for the resource.
  .field_flag_names.v1.Resource resource = 4
      [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];

  ...
}

// The request to archive resource.
message ArchiveResourceRequest {
  // The resource name of the resource within a service.
  string name = 1 [
    (.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED,
    (.google.api.resource_reference) = {
      type: "example.googleapis.com/Resource"
    }
  ];

  // String field.
  string string_field = 2;
}

service FieldFlagNames {
  ...

  // Update a single resource.
  rpc UpdateResource(.field_flag_names.v1.UpdateResourceRequest)
      returns (.field_flag_names.v1.Resource) {
    option (.google.api.http) = {
      patch: "/v1/{resource.name=projects/*/locations/*/resources/*}",
      body: "resource"
    };
    option (.google.api.method_resource) = {
      type: "example.googleapis.com/Resource"
    };
    option (.google.api.method_signature) = "resource,update_mask";
  }

  // Archives the given resource.
  rpc ArchiveResource(ArchiveResourceRequest) returns (Resource) {
    option (google.api.http) = {
      post: "/v1/{name=projects/*/locations/*/resources/*}:archive"
      body: "*"
    };
  }
}
```


## Gcloud config:
* Users can specify whether or not a descriptor should be included in a flag
name.

```
apis:
- ...
  generated_flags:
  - selector: field_flag_names.v1.Message.included
    include_field_descriptor_in_flag_name: true
  - selector: field_flag_names.v1.Message.excluded
    include_field_descriptor_in_flag_name: false
```

## YAML Output:
* The flag name is generated by traversing the field descriptors that lead
to the leaf field descriptor.
* If the command is CRUDL, the body field is not included in the flag name.
* The immediate parent field descriptor and leaf descriptor are included
in the flag name generation by default.
* Field descriptors that belong to a oneof are included in the name
generation by default.
* Field descriptors can be excluded or included based on the gcloud config.

```
arguments:
    ...
    params:
    - arg_name: included-child-string-field
      api_field: archiveResourceRequest.resource.msg.included.parent.child.stringField
      required: false
      repeated: false
      help_text: |-
        String field.
```


## Gcloud UX:

```
$ gcloud field-flag-names resources create ... --included-child-string-field=...
```
